segments.speaker: Usher
segments.text: Good evening. Can I see your ticket?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Of course. I'm in balcony row C.

segments.speaker: Usher
segments.text: Balcony is up the stairs and to the left.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. Is there a program available?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Do people usually come back to the same seat after intermission, or is it open seating?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. First time in this venue, so I'm learning the routine.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: It really is. The proportions feel very intimate.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'm looking forward to hearing it in action.
